body_txt: Desc-desc-descri-Add information on Porky Pig Pronunciation here. A character tries to use a big, impressive word or two. Unfortunately, they are having trouble pronunci-pronouncia ...er, saying it, whether due to unfamiliarity with the word, or a speech imp-p-p-p ... trouble talking. After a couple tries, they'll give up and substitute an easie-e-e-e-easie-e-e-e-e-easie-e-e-e-e... better word , or just clam up complet-t-t-t-complet-t-t-t-t-complet-t-t-t... fully. The Trope Nam-Nam-Name--Titler is, obviously, Porky Pig of Looney Tunes f-f-fa-f-f-f-fa-f-f-f... renown. Interestingly, Porky Pig manages to subvert it as, for comical purpo-p-p-purpo-p-p-p-intentions , he always finds himself struggling to pronounce a very easy word and eventually substitu-tu-tu-substitu-tu-tu-substit-t-t-t-replaces a much more complica-ca-ca-complica-c-c-c-complica-c-c-c-harder word which he says without a single mista-sta-sta-sta-mista-sta-sta-sta-blunder . Compare Parrot Expo-WHAT? , which is when a character st-st-st-strug-st-st-st-strug-st-st-st-fights to say a word that's new to them. Contrast Sesq-q-q-q-quipedalian Loquaci-louca-louqa-smart talk , and Spock Speak , this trope's exact oppos-s-s-s-oppos-s-s-s-oppo-s-s-s-s... antonym. Compare Buffy Sp-Sp-Sp-Buffy Sp-Sp-Sp-Buffy Sp-Sp-Sp... Language Like That Show About Vampires , which similarly involves a character's conversational reach exceeding their verbal grasp. Also compare Delusions of Eloqu-qu-qu-Eloqu-qu-qu-qu-Eloqu-qu-qu-qu... Fancy Ways of Talking , where the character muddles the big words but ploughs onward anyway. If this doesn't happen ever, it's because Realistic Diction is Unreal-l-l-Unreal-l-l-Unreal-l-l-l... Fake . Not related to Cannot Sp-Sp-Sp-Sp-Cannot Sp-Sp-Sp-Sp-Cannot Sp-Sp-Sp-Sp... Unable to Say the Darn Thing .
